description: A red, white and black WANTED poster with a Department of Homeland Security seal in the upper left. Below the WANTED banner is a list of charges, then a framed portrait of an adult man with short dark hair, followed by a name in large type and a paragraph of italic descriptive text. A red ICE Tip Line phone number is printed in large digits at the bottom.
notable_text: WANTED; Vehicle Theft, Stolen Property, Conspiracy, Petty Theft, DUI, Resisting an Officer, Battery, and Felony Possession of a Firearm; ICE Tip Line; 866-347-2423
